message:
fix(capacity): add hard capacity limits to key-role registry, dedupe store, and evidence endpoint

Three unbounded-growth data structures now have hard caps to prevent
resource exhaustion:

- key_role_separation: MAX_ACTIVE_BINDINGS=4096, returns new
  RegistryFull error variant (KRS_REGISTRY_FULL) when exceeded;
  duplicate-check still runs first
- idempotency_store: MAX_DEDUPE_ENTRIES=65536 with two-phase guard —
  sweep_expired first, then return DedupeResult::Conflict if still at
  capacity (reuses existing conflict path, no new error type)
- sdk_integration: MAX_EVIDENCE_RECORDS=8192, returns
  VsiError::submission_rejected with current count and max

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
